q: What are the class days and timings?
a: Live classes run on weekends — {classDays}, {classTime}. The batch starts {batchStart}, and recordings are available if you ever miss one.
Live, interactive cohort sessions — you learn and build alongside others, with recordings to catch up if you miss one.

q: What if I miss a live class?
a: No problem — every session is recorded and in your dashboard within hours, plus weekly doubt-clearing sessions to catch up. You never fall behind.

q: How long do I have access?
a: Four years — to every recording, resource, and the learner community, long after the live cohort wraps.

q: Do I get a certificate or credential?
a: Yes — finish the cohort and you earn a verifiable DevOps Engineer (Associate) credential: a shareable digital badge you can add to LinkedIn and your résumé.

q: What language are the sessions in?
a: Sessions are delivered in clear, accessible English.

q: Can I expense this with my employer?
a: Yes — you'll get an invoice after enrollment that you can submit to your company's L&D or reimbursement team.
